conversion.cm_to_ft_in: totalInches = round(cm / 2.54); feet = floor(totalInches / 12); inches = totalInches % 12

height.runtimeRequirement: Switching units must recalculate and update the displayed value immediately. The renderer must initialize with a visible selected unit, a valid numeric value, and an enabled CTA that saves the default value when the user continues without editing.

weight.runtimeRequirement: Switching units must recalculate and update the displayed value immediately. The renderer must initialize with a visible selected unit, a valid numeric value, and an enabled CTA that saves the default value when the user continues without editing.
